events.text: hi talia! how r u??? have you found other shell?
now i am at orisson (after saint jean pied de port and before roncisvalle)
i think maria is going to roncisvalle today
I'm sorry I missed it!! Is the second one far after Mauleon? I stayed here to rest today, and i will surely find it tomorrow!
one shell it was placed 2 km after hopital
you have to find it haha
i met a guy from czech republic that know you
Hi Jacopo - It’s Mark from New York
You know, it will be some days before i get there... I'm sleeping tonight at farm landrania, i hope I'll find the second one tomorrow
do not worry haha they are well hidden and nobody will take them
r u still on the way to zubiri with carla?
Hi. We finally made it to town and are with Carla and Isabel.
ah ok... i waited u but at 15.30 i moved... and now i am going to the place after larassoana. can u please give me the whatsapp number of carla?
r u planning to stop at zubiri today?

hi Carla!! its Jacopo! i am continued after zubiri and after larassoana also.. i have a 3 euro debit with you hahah but i will find a way to give it back to you during the way hahaha do you know the tom thumb story? haha stay tuned 😂😂😂
r u planning to stop in zubiri or r u continuing today?

the story of tom thumb in few words is the story of a child that was leaving things on the way while he was walking to know how to come back and do not loose the way... i was thinking to leave the money hidden on the way and give you the clues to find them hahah
still movimg because the place after larassoana is closed on wesdney 😭
hahahaha i also meet new people.. the place here is amazing haha a lot of food! i ate a lot here
pamplona is 10/12 km far from where i am
now i am taking a rest in the garden
there is a little park here

i think i can wait you if you dont arrive too late but then i will continue to zariquiegui because it is in the middle of the uphill so i do half uphill today and half uphill tomorrow to split the pain 😂
ok i stay here today.. i just checked the flights and bought a new one on 24 of july
have u all already book a place to stay?
i m with cathrine at the albergue near the cathedral
How much are you going to pay for the hostel?
9 euro no dinner and no breakfast
yes its clean but not the best place to live haha
there are many here in pamplona
haha i was asking if u want me to join, but then i thought to the thing u said before hahaha “always the same people” hahaha
yes have to put the shoes
it was nice to speak with u today, good night and get a nice rest for tomorrow 😁
Mark Ripka ha creato questo gruppo.
Mark Ripka ha aggiunto Theresia Bavenby.
have a good day and buen camino! i just went out from the hostel
will try to go till puente la reina but i will decide village by village
i think to go out to buy something to eat
do u need something? or do u join me?
did u already see some place to gov
Hey it's ginger. I left my walk stick on table.  Can u keep for me
hi.. yes ur stick is in safe 😁😁
ok, i went to take a shower and already lost catherine haha dont know where she is now 😂
i am going around the city
lets meet at 8.00 in front of the church to get the stamp (if they have) and then start walking
i arrived to puente la reina
the today’s walking was really good! nice landacapes
yes it was tairing but nice!!
Mark we think we will need another bottle

I had a bit of drama with the bus here tonight. The bus stop was mis-labeled so I almost missed the last bus (before the hostel closes). Luckily, the bus driver or a passenger saw me and they waited while I ran clear around a plaza crossing 8-12 lanes of rush-hour traffic to catch it! Made it back in time - whew!
pam today i met a woman from texas (san antonio)
We’re on a restroom break in Zarikiegi. Mark’s trying to find out how to walk out of Pamplona.
Ok. Am at Albergue Puente in Puente la Reina. It’s a nice walk from Obanos, but I was on overload. Cannot move!
Ok. Am at Albergue Puente in Puente la Reina. It’s a nice walk from Obanos, but I was on overload. Cannot move!
i am just arrived in estella guys haha i am dead also today 😂
I am soooo jealous!  Leave cherry bags for us, Jacopo!
actually.. cherry were not a good deal hahahaha after we eat them a lot, we found worms inside 😭😭😭
we ate cherries with proteins included
hahahaha yes.. and what worse than seeing a worm in a bitten cherry?
😂😂😂 btw cherries were really good despite the worms hhahahha
this evening i will drink tequila
to kill all of them haha
tequila without worm.. enough proteins today for me
no near my place no restaurants haha
btw we can meet at 19.00 not at 20.00
i will meet catherine at the place we left at 18.50
thanks Ginger! tomorrow morning i would like to meet u again to give u a small gift from me!! at what time u think to go?
ok, i will be there at 8 😁 then
it is nothing of big value. just a small souvenir about the camino from me (home made)
ok.. here is not so good instead 😂 they dont give blanket neither 😂😂😂

it is donativo.. donativo works in this way: to enter u must have the pilgrims credential so they accept  you to stay and the day you leave u leave a donation depending how much u feel... usually i leave 15 or 20 when there is dinner and breakfast (plus i help to clean the dishes) but to this one i think i will leave 5 to 10 depending on how much good will be the breakfast tomorrow haha (there is no dinner in this one)
btw the appointment with ginger is at 19.00 still dont know where (but i think near her place because she said there are restaurants), do u join us or u think u will be hangry before of 19.00?
hey talia! how r u???? where r u today?? have u found the orher shells?? 😁😁
hi andreius! r ur feet good?
Haha. You’re up late again?!  If you’re not going to sleep, you might as well hang out with me...
Andrius and i are leaving now
Just walked out of my albergue
I am going to sleep right now
ok.. i am moving to ur hostel now
At bus station. Wish I were walking. So gracious for all ur help.
r u in the bus now?
haha yes it is good haga i filled ur bottle haha
google maps saved me a lot of times
yeees we r arrived in los arcos one hour ago and already drank 3 beers hahaha
and the path was with no shadows, no treees.. very sunny and hot
to figure out how to go to lograno
just follow the camino, ill meet u on the way

yes why not! before in the hostel i met other people and they told me to go together to have dinner somewehre but now i lost them and dont have the number, so if i meet them again i can tell them there is also you if u want
now i have to finish to do things and then go downstairs. if i dont meet them again then i go out and we can meet, otherwise we can go with them if i meet again
make sense what i have said? hahah i think its very bad english
yes take ur time 😁 yes the next one will be after orisson.. do not remember where exactly haha
yes i am having good an nice adventures!! hope u the same 😁
btw in orisson, show the shells to the young guy at the bar (michael) when he saw it he wanted me to explain what it was and he was enjoing the game a lot haha
Im sitting here with a lovely Italian girl from Torino, she wants to know where you are from
i am from perugia but i worked in turin for 4 years since 6 months ago
thomas is two days ahead of me
hahaha yes he was enjoing a lot the story when i told to him 😂😂😂
How do you know where Thomas is?
two days ago he told me he was in los arcos and i am in los arcos today
so he his two days ahead
the donativo in zabaldika is really good
amazing dinner, amazing breakfast and amazing services
all the other i slept were not so special to give the advice to someone, they were just on the average to be pilgrim hostel
hi giselle i am with catherine and met other people. we are moving to the place called maria josè azcona beguristain
when u arrive in the neighborood write to me
a restaurant near “monaco hotel” it has pilgrims menu for 13
enter in the monaco hotel and do the stairs to go upstair
Hi Jacobo! How did you do today?
Ola my Italian friend.  Rise and shine and give God the glory!  Beautiful day. Sending blessings ur way.
thank you ginger!!! what about u? r u in madrid today?
Before hopping train to Madrid...I left plastic bag at front desk hotel with ur name. Told them u might get it on Tues.
i will try to catch it!
i am moving now... will hear catherine later
Logrono old town very nice. Long bridge crossing river.  Ice cream capital of Spain.  Be sure get ur gelato!
there is one of that also in viana (me and catherine are here today)
tomorrow we will walk throught logrono! i will go to the hotel to pick the bag u left and then stay there a bit to eat a gelato
at what time is ur flight?
cool we are taking showers now and then going out for dinner
we will see later for sure i still have to do brakfast
i am arrived in viana now
i think i will stay here till 16.00 and then will decide if to continue other 9 km till logrono or not
Hi, I am at viana, staying here
i am at the garden behind the church now
if u want come to here
behind the church there is a small garden
i am taking a rest on the grass
how r u??? can u walk?
Yes. I am walking, but at pace 20min per km. Very slow.
How are you? Where are you Jacobo?
thinking if to go till logrono or not
yes its a good idea to go slow
thanks haha but i am a bit tired
i think i will rest here and wait the hot hours
and then at 16.00 will decide if to continue other 9km
r u still with the others?
the last one its the most special one. do not miss it
Dinner at albergue is salad and lentils. I’m going to pass. Plaza sounds good.
Jacobo, come va e dove sei?
I want to shoot for Logrono.
I was told  today that the albergue municipal in Logroño is very good
Hey do NOT send to albergue municipal in Logroño. Instead send to “ENTRESUEÑOS” in Logroño.
hello its jacopo moscioni from italy
today i am still in viana
iam still on the bed and will move in one hour and stay in lograno for visit the city in the early afternoon and then think to continue to the next village
Danielle and Isabel where are you? I just arrived in Viana
In Viana. Follow Camino into old town. Sporting goods store has buffa, poles, etc.
Is that in Viana?  We are walking up hill into old town area.
Mark Ripka ha aggiunto ~ Danny Herman e ~ Joe Herman.
Have you found the hostel yet Carla? I will soon be there. This afternoon was a tough walk!
Guys, Theresia and I are in the albergue municipal. Looks good
I’m at the albergue where Pam is staying; it’s nice.
me and catherine are having lunch in logrono now, then will move to navarrete
i will try to find a good gelato
when i get the wifi i send u pics, but today i didnt take too much
sorry i was outside with others
wifi doesnt work good at the today’s hostel
arrived at the hostel el cantaro
i paied with my phone so now i still have 10 eur more to spend vefore today
and it closes at 22.00 but they gives the keys to open the door
took a shower, whashed clothes and now going around... r u in the mood to go out also or not?
so at what time u put the alarm?
(btw in my place there is no kitchen 😭)
there are dishes, glasses, forks etc
first shell placed 300 meters before ventosa village. u cant miss it 😂😂
second shell placed 5 km after the first one in front of a grape field, near of a big circle of rocks
the first shell is 200/300 meters before ventosa
Think i gonna go to najera
and didnt find the first one?
ah ok i didnt see it, maybe arrived later
i just left the third shell now
also me and cathering arrived in navarrete today
Tell Catherine Happy Birthday for me.
atm we r not together but for sure i wll say happy birthday to her for you when i meet her later
We would love to have a drink for Catherine’s birthday if she would like but we understand if she wants to be alone. Let us know.
we would meet in azrona but catherine stopped at najera because she had pain to the feet and i was already to azrona
allright (but she doesnt have always internet on)
(there are two numbers: one for whatsapp, one for calls)
she is not receiving messages now (only one gray flag on whatsapp)
Mark says meet us by the church
I m in front of your hostel
Guys were are you? I am almost in Navarrete
Did someone make a reservation in my name at Navarrete for tonight? I called to make one for tomorrow and woman on phone was confused and worried me.
i have been there. its nice because they give u the keys to enter even if it officially closes at 22.00
and they accept card (if someone needs)
Carla and I are gearing up; who’s in Najera?
No, I'm staying at hostel Villa Narravete but I think it's full now.
Glad you are with Mark. Someone needs to take care of him. LOL
Did any of you make it to the weekly market in Navarrete?
Theresia we are in the square across from you Hostel having a snack and a beer if you want to nm join us
Guys in Navarrete, is it good to meet up at 7 at the same place ad before? And then we can decide if we want to eat there or somewhere else.
lets try this evening under wifi (if it works) otherwise on 22 i ll have new gigabyte on my phone. now i am running out of giga for the next 3 days
btw have a good return in texas!
Sorry tonight no work. I arrive 530 pm andvu r 7 hrs ahead = 1230 am.  Call Thurs if u get WiFi n gb.  Safe journey. I envy u for completing.
not yet but in 20 min yes, and u how r u?
and in the middle i will stop to have breakfast aleo
santo domingo is the next one for me
ues i could stop there to have breakfast
i have booked the albergue in villamajor del rio
at the moment i am the only one here
roadside fruit but without worms haha
Where are you aiming at tonight?
Ciruena. The Santa Maria Real is really cool. I’m touring that now
I'm in Najera right now and  my plan is to stay in Azofra tonight
Heading to Najera. Albergue ppl in Navarrete super sweet  - no charge for me flaking on res and they’re forwarding my pack to Najera no extra charge!
We are at the Albergue de Pilgims on Calle Street
Will try. Need to get backpack In Najera
Quick detour in Ventosa bcs of 1 km of art. I’m a sucker for art.
Ok. They have 2 beds to a room here. If you and Theresia are coming here perhaps y'all can room together. Its clean and it is 10 Euro per bed
Ok it doesn't seem to be very busy. If you or Theresia want me to reserve a bed let me know and I will.
Hi Isabel!  I hope your feet are doing well. Mark, Carla and I are in an albergue with the very unique albergue owner from the way.
Pam - is it the nutso albergue guy - Ramón - who talks to himself and dances upstairs?!
It’s the Guadeloupe. You should stop at the Granon St. John Baptist albergue. You sleep in the attic on mats and candle light and they have a communal dinner and breaks.
guadalupe! ive been there yesterday! its cool! it has like private rooms for three ppl
but the man is a bit strange
He was curled up on the couch with a blanket over his head when I arrived.
i am in a village but dont remember the name haha
Okay😂 I think that you are 7 km away
today i met two other china people
the city a little ghostly, yes
where i am now is worst
what? u took a taxi to santo domingo?
ah ok haha yes now ive understood
btw i think once i arrive to a big city (burgos? is it big?) i can spend a whole day there and wait some people i left behind
Hey Mark, is Danny with you?
He was.  We just left him at the church albergue
He and Andrius have checked in and Danny was getting in the shower.
Send a photo of the beds in the Grańon albergue!
Look for Corpus Christi celebrations tomorrow and Sunday! I’m helping make carpets of flower petals and leaves for the occasion.
guys tomorrow ill be in burgos and will stay there two days. r u planning to arrive there on sunday we can meet again （if someone cares haha)
Mark, Carla, Isabel and I will be in Burgos Sunday!
chriss!! the american guy that offered a beer to us
tomorrow ill be in burgos and will stay there two days
so u have time to catch me hahaha
yes i mean one day off
i think i will search for a swimming pool
Try to do. Miss our beer time
we will take one another time
albergue with piscina (piscina is swimming pool)
r u taking a rest or u have already took the hostel?
today is still good for walk
i feel like a train haha
already did 33km and will do other 6 now
hi Chris. today i am arrived in atapuerca (i did 40 km, wow!) and tomorrow will be burgos
i think i will stay there two days so we can meet again the day after tomorrow before your departure!
I think that I have to cancel my cooking plan because they don’t really have a supermarket here
happy bday Chriss!! will we meet tomorrow in burgos?!
We will be in Burgos Sunday around 2 or 3 pm
yes i will sleep in burgos two noghts
i am already arrived in burgos
nope i sleep two nights here
i sleep the night between sat and sunday and the night between sunday and monday
Bycicle to make a tour of burgos ?
the bike is free for 2 hours and half
ohh 😛😛 it should be beer moment now
maybe it was 11.00 when i arrived
So where are you staying at?
i cannot stay two days here and the guy already didnt accept 6 people because they didnt have the credential or because they arrived by bus
i am around the city also
going to the tourism office in frony of the cathedral
i have took a bike haha
We are at the Albergue hanging out by the pool. You are welcome to join us
Andrius did you get a place?
Joe, I am at your place. Where are you guys?
Hi Andrius I'm in my room are you still here
Mark where are you at today
Japopo! Good to see you. Is that in Burgos?
and took a bike to cycle around
Where is it? And where is Carla?
Andreus we will see you in Burgos
Oh good. See you in Burgos. Will try and catch up then.
Do you think i need booking for albergue in burgos ?
i slept in one yesterday but now i have ti change
when i go there to the new one i can tell them one bed for u also
in la divina pastora they have
but the guy is very bad
he didnt allow to sleep to many people
because he thought they didnt walk
so when u arrive u has to seem very swet and tired
dont arrive in front of him very fresh haha
okk just let me know when u r in town
u know how to enjoy the life haha
we r just entered in a bar searching for a table to drink a beer
do u and jessica wants to join us?
yea its me, catherine and others
it is like a party on the street
but google maps says it open at 10.00
just in front of the museum
in 10 min will open the museum
Hi. For how long are you staying Burgos?
i am staying here the whole day today
I’m with Pam  and Isabel and we’re in Villabal. Cath is here at the moment, too.  Carla just got to Burgos.
atm i am at the human evolution museum and i think will go out in one hour
see u later with u all too
Hi. Heard you had a nice lunch with Carla. Isabel, Pam, and I are new with her in the apartment we rented. Believe it or not, it’s even nicer than the one on Pamplona!  What are you up to?
i am in front of the cathedral
they are setting up something strange
Ciao JACOPO! Se vuoi,  io pensavo di partecipare al free walking Tour di burgos (offerta libera) In teoria va prenotato ma io andrò così spontaneamente.
ciao io sto al museo dell evoluzione umana con ocean
quando comincia il free walking tour?
Non ancora. Ho appena fatto il check-in in albergue
Vaaa bene! Gli dico subito che arrivi
ok.. arriviamo apprna ocean finiscr con le cose da donna
se tu non mangi e avevi altri piani ovviamente non sei costretto
in caso ci vediamo dopo pranzo
hi ginger!! all is going good, i will meet catherin again in few hours
just not have too much time because always with other ppl and at 22.00 the albergue closes the door to go to sleep and cant speak inside
I miss y'all more than u know.  Trouble adjusting to being home again. I miss Spain more than anything
later in the afternoon when i meet cath again we will find a place to call u
whatsapp calls dont work to much
yes i have an email for sure
where r u now in burgos?
i am still at the museum
but in few minute we will go out
and find a place to eat
we will come to the center
Jacopo i am going to have lunch in a restaurant that opens at 2pm: Maridajes
Jacopo are you going to the department?
but nobody here except me and ocean
Andrius Camino ha cambiato il nome del gruppo in "Pamplona Party kkkikk".
guys some people told me that tonight at 00.00 will be firewarka
there is a place to go to burn wishes but its 4 km far and i do not exactly where
i am staying here also tomorrow
u mean the human evolution museum?
btw i am thinking to leave this evening
so we have to meet before
ah ok! there is no castle anymore (just ruins) bit there is a really nice landscape
dont know yet, mabe 19, maybe 20, maybe after dinner
thank u Chris!!! i will! i am really glad to have met such nice people like u and Jessica
Mark Ripka ha cambiato il nome del gruppo in "Pamplona Party People".
Am in Burgos. Where’s the party pad?
is there someone in da house?
i am with danielle just out of the door
Hi, arrived at Burgos. Where can I meet you guys? Thanks.
Guys, any of you meeting for dinner tonight? Me and Danny staying at albergue municipal. Could join you later.
No, Andrius.  I’ll call you or we’ll send a group message when know where going.
three days in burgos for me and i went there three times haha
so romantic haha but remember: u r not my type haha
i will send u the proof i will walk at noght
oh its so frequent in turin haha
turin is rhe city where i lived the past 4 years for work
we r just went to el horno if u want join us
in the same street of yesterday
mm wait i think no bc the others eant eggs
and now goong to find a place to fix the shoes
if u like hamburgers, the orisson group told me they ll go to the tgb the good burger for lunch
i think to join them and in the afternoon im thinking to leave
OK, thanks but i already got some food . I am gonna sleep now.  And visit later. Buen camino for late afternoon, 🚶🏻
qould u like to meet me and giselle in front of the cathedral at 18.00?
from ginger email: [...] Would you and Katherine and Giselle consider meeting me in Lisbon next year to do the Beach Peru walk to Santiago? [...]
i feel a bit oppressed for sure haha but i understand that she is doing it because she cares (maybe too much)
What are you guys up to later for dinner? Thinking of grabbing a beer soon
i am along the river now
and thinking to leave burgos at the evening
i would like to meet u and catheringe again before i live
i already said goodbye to all the others
at 17.30 i have to be to the shoes repairs shop to take back my shoes
so we can meet around 18.00 or a bit before near the cathedral
and then fine a place for my last beer in burgos
I just ran to store and lost the ladies. Andrius is coming back to you; Gisele is packing up and coming back, too.
Looking for Catherine and Marcia so that we can all have dinner with you.
but i think ill not have dinner
maybe will eat somethint to 100 montaditos
then i wanna go to the castle again for half an hour and then go away
Don’t know the place...we heard a great suggestion for Italian (in your honor).  Want to stop by?
i an going to the castello
because wanna see the su set
i think we can drink but also eat (but not sure about eat)
u can see the signal because it is reflecting the flash light haha
proofs sent 😂😂 good night and buen camino to all
Awww....a bedroom with a view!!! Congratulations, Jacopo!!!
but there is only the albergue in this “village”
Theresa, text Mark, me or Danielle when you can.
Therezia. i m checking the bike shop but am in 10 min walking distance
I am going to go home pack, eat sth and then get going by bike
Ok, Mark... that’s the last time I give you the keys!
Pam, Isabel, Theresia, and I are just leaving Burgos now.
Turns out trips to Sto Domingo de Silos have to be planned in advance and take two days. Bus gets there in afternoon, you stay overnight, then come back next pm.
It’s at the very end of the street straight uphill. When you come in, the door is on the right and may be closed. You can hear Mark’s boisterous storytelling through the windows.
thanks a lot for the lamp.. its great!
arrived in sanbol and met and spoke with two men from los angeles
i have put the feet but cannot stay longer than 10 sec
i guess u didnt find the last shell
cool! here there is only the albergue in the middle of nowhere
it has a garden and a little swimming pool
but the water is fucking cold
the swimming pool is a bit shaming
stay here bc tomorrow i want to go to itero de castello, so 25 km today and 25 tomorrow
if now i do more (i should), then tomorrow will do nothing
but i prefer to split the km, so i think today i stop here
Lol. I think I will advance. Mark hasn’t even left Burgos. Don’t know where the others are
hahaha really? and he also was thinking to wake up at 2.00am 😂
dunno, i think yes for dinner
and where did u arrive today?
me carla and giselle we are at sanbol
where do u plan to go tomorrow?
ok the one before of mine
i try to get a bed on tje san nicolas where they have no electricity and only candles
the village is itero de castillo
the monastery managed by people of san jacopo da perugia
good we are in a really pacefull place
i am goong to sleep now (at least i try because i m not feel asleep but i need to sleep bc tomorrow i would tty to start at 5)
Yes in viana she talked 5 min with us and kriss &jess
guys in sahagun do not miss the place where they give u the certification of “half camino” or somethin like that
i still dont know where is that, but i was told about that now
How are you guys? Where are you?
itero de la vega now but at 15.00 ill to back to itero del castillo
said the man that starts walking at 15.00
i am at itero de la vega now but will come back to itero del castillo at 15.00
Nice and toasty at Burgos Castle
guys from castrojeriz, tomorrow me and giselle will start at 3.00am.. if someone of u wants to start at 1.00am and join us at 3.00 in itero de la vega will be well accepted to the night party

yes.. the dictionary says: loco is that person who prefers to walk under the sun without shadows on 38 celsius degrees, instead to walk under the stars, watching the sunrise, and feeling the fresh hair of the morning
It’s a beast, don’t let the photos fool you. We miss and Carla!
Okay, Carla will probably hang back. She’s gonna wait for the group in Fromista. But I will go with you at 3
I’ll wait for you outside my albergue at 3
will be there at 3.15 i think
asking if she is would join us tomorrow, but it means she would wake up two hours earlier than us

but she would not walk alone at night, so i propose that: what if tomorrow we just wait her here and then continue to walk till 10.00/11.00 wherever we arrive, and then wait at the place and after dinner continuing till the destination?
it means walking at night and also taking small breaks outside during the night like a true pillgrim
i didnt propose it to her yet
but if for u is okay then i try to ask to her if its ok also for her
so it would be okay for u to walk dueing the night between tomorrow and the day after tomorrow?
tomorrow me and giselle will walk at night
do u join us???? will be very very hot during the day
today i arrived at 10.00 and i was really fresh
and didnt feel the hot because it was good
it is a little church where the people sleep inside
but i think u would not like it
bc the bath is outside haha
there is another little house near the church
there is no wifi here in the church
maybe i will replicate it tomorrow
the signals were reflecting the light
and they were the only things viewable
yes gisele she wants try it haha
Is there a problem with checking in in albergue?
and also catherine is thinking on that
i am nkw at itero del castillo
wanna see it when ull come back at home 😁
thinking to arrive at fromista in 2
arriving... in ehich bar r u?
for now yes. i wont walk after 10.00
share ur live position on maps to me
ao we can track each other for today
i lost the charger of my powerbank
and yesterday i borrowed my powerbank to all the others bc no electricity
so now i am running out of power
yes i think i left it to the wall
